历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7393 → 6436 → (no Physics Category data in 2023) → 8466 → 6487, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, there was a notable backward shift, followed by a substantial recovery to 6487 in 2025, showing a volatile pattern in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 6487. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 53 in 2021, 30 in 2022, 41 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 36, a decrease of 3 (about 7.7% reduction) compared to 2025, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing Shandong University's main ranking of approximately 22nd on the Soft Science Ranking, stable around 22nd in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. Shandong University (Weihai) shares the brand reputation of Shandong University, which has been somewhat negative recently (e.g., the study partner incident), but the Weihai campus is relatively independent and less affected. In terms of Douyin popularity, Shandong University ranks 20th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Shares Shandong University's discipline evaluation results: Mathematics A+ is a top discipline, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, and 19 other A- or above disciplines. The Weihai campus mainly offers majors in Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Physics, closely related to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended for 2024–2026, Computer Science remains highly popular, Mathematics/Statistics are recommended as relatively hot, and related majors have high application heat. In 2026, the province's Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 148,000, an increase of about 3.4% from 143,000 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6487, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 7.7%, a 3.4% increase in Physics Category examinees, and the attraction of popular majors like Electronic Information expanding to 22 spots, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 6137, with a range of 5637–6637.

- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marine Science (Marine Science, Marine Resource Development Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5637–6637, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Physics as the main choice, with Tier 1 Electronic Information and Mathematics as reach options, and Tier 3 Marine Science as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 5637), prioritize reaching for the flagship majors in Electronic Information and Mathematics.
